---
title: "From body to mind: How body-mind axial awareness training enhances body awareness, mindfulness, positive embodiment and mental health in healthcare students"
author: "Tien, Y.-M., Lin, C.-Y., Lien, Y.-W., & Hsu, L.-C."
image: "../../assets/study-covers-en/2026-tien-healthcare-students.png"
lang: en
language: ../../assets/language-en.yml
toc-title: "On this page"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
source("../../R/bmaa_plot_theme.R")
```

::: {.study-cover}
<img src="../../assets/study-covers-en/2026-tien-healthcare-students.png" alt="Body awareness increased">

Cover figure: after BMAA, healthcare students showed increased body awareness.
:::

## Method

A non-randomized pretest-posttest control-group study with healthcare students. The BMAA group received an eight-week BMAA program with weekly practice, home practice, and written reflection.

## Key Findings

Healthcare students showed positive changes in body awareness, mental health, life satisfaction, and emotional expression after BMAA. BAAI measures body awareness; AMHS reflects mental health, with higher scores indicating better functioning; SWLS measures life satisfaction, with higher scores indicating greater satisfaction; TAS-20 measures alexithymia, so lower scores indicate less difficulty identifying and expressing emotions.

The BMAA group increased in body awareness, mental health, and life satisfaction and decreased in alexithymia, while the control group changed less or moved in the opposite direction.

```{r}
#| fig-height: 6.6
dat <- data.frame(
  outcome = rep(c("Body awareness (BAAI)", "Mental health (AMHS)", "Life satisfaction (SWLS)", "Alexithymia (TAS-20)"), each = 4),
  group = rep(c("BMAA", "BMAA", "Control", "Control"), 4),
  time = rep(c("Pretest", "Posttest", "Pretest", "Posttest"), 4),
  value = c(
    92.74, 99.87, 95.74, 94.85,
    94.08, 101.00, 101.70, 99.44,
    23.82, 25.26, 25.37, 25.26,
    47.32, 43.13, 51.44, 50.81
  )
)
bmaa_facet_line_plot(dat, "BMAA improved body and mental-health indicators in healthcare students", ylab = "Mean score", ncol = 2)
```

## Reference

Tien, Y.-M., Lin, C.-Y., Lien, Y.-W., & Hsu, L.-C. (2026). From body to mind: How body-mind axial awareness training enhances body awareness, mindfulness, positive embodiment and mental health in healthcare students. *Health Psychology and Behavioral Medicine, 14*(1), Article 2656029. https://doi.org/10.1080/21642850.2026.2656029
